events.headline: ‘PROUD AS A QATARI’: COUNTRY’S PM SALUTES RESILIENCE AMID IRANIAN ATTACKS
events.detail: The country s prime minister urges resilience, says government committed to ensuring people s lives are not disrupted.

events.headline: MASSIVE FIRES ON TWO OIL TANKERS AFTER ATTACK IN IRAQI WATERS
events.detail: Two foreign tankers were seen ablaze in Iraqi territorial waters after a strike near the al-Faw port.

events.headline: TRUMP INSISTS IRAN ‘ABSOLUTELY DECIMATED’ AS OIL TANKERS AND PORTS BURN (VIDEOS)
events.detail: Several oil tankers along with a major port in Oman are reportedly in flames amid ongoing the US-Israeli war with Iran Read Full Article at RT.com

events.headline: TRUMP: ‘I DON’T KNOW’ ABOUT REPORT US AT FAULT IN SCHOOL STRIKE
events.detail: Donald Trump denied knowledge of a military investigation finding the US responsible for the Minab girls school strike.

events.headline: IRAN-LINKED HACKERS HIT MEDICAL GIANT STRYKER IN RETALIATORY CYBERATTACK
events.detail: Group claims to have seized 50 terabytes of data in response to deadly US-Israeli strikes on Iranian school.

events.headline: HOW TRUMP HAS ADDRESSED THE DEADLY IRAN SCHOOL BOMBING
events.detail: The US president denies knowledge of findings that the US military was behind the deadly strike amid calls for a probe.
